written.scope: mouse hippocampus, dentate gyrus granule cells
written.quote_text: we used next-generation RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) to produce a quantitative, whole genome characterization of gene expression for the major excitatory neuronal classes of the hippocampus; namely, granule cells and mossy cells of the dentate gyrus, and pyramidal cells of areas CA3, CA2, and CA1

written.scope: rodent hippocampus, dentate gyrus granule cells
written.quote_text: The hippocampal mossy fibers (MFs), the axons of the granule cells (GCs) of the dentate gyrus, innervate mossy cells and interneurons in the hilus on their way to CA3 where they innervate interneurons and pyramidal cells

written.scope: rodent hippocampus, mossy fiber terminals (DG granule cell axons)
written.quote_text: VGLUT1, VGLUT2, and VGAT coexist in mossy fiber terminals of the h

written.scope: neonatal mouse dentate gyrus granule cells
written.quote_text: immediately after birth, GCs exhibit a clear GABAergic phenotype. Only later they integrate the classical glutamatergic trisynaptic hippocampal circuit

written.scope: neonatal/adult mouse dentate gyrus granule cells
written.quote_text: AMPA receptor subunits GluR1 and GluR2 are expressed in differentiated granule cells, but not in stem cells, in neonatal, and adult dentate gyrus
